item.description: ### Changed - **A completely redesigned Live Activity.** The lock-screen card now changes with your fleet: calm and green while agents work (one dot per session, a live elapsed timer), flipping to an amber "needs you" the moment one is blocked — with a live countdown showing how long you have to answer from your phone before the agent falls back to the terminal. Timers tick on their own, and file paths no longer appear on your lock screen. Pair with the latest companion app from TestFlight.
